questions.text: Which gas is evolved when an acid reacts with a metal?
questions.explanation: When an acid reacts with a metal, hydrogen gas is evolved. Example: Zn + 2HCl → ZnCl2 + H2

questions.text: The pH of a neutral solution is:
questions.explanation: pH 7 is neutral (pure water). pH < 7 is acidic, pH > 7 is basic.

questions.text: Bleaching powder is chemically calcium oxychloride (CaOCl2).
questions.explanation: Bleaching powder is calcium oxychloride (CaOCl2). It's used for bleaching cotton, disinfecting water, etc.

questions.text: The chemical formula of washing soda is ________.
questions.explanation: Washing soda is sodium carbonate decahydrate (Na2CO3.10H2O). It's used in laundry and water softening.
